zh.Holbrook, Somerset, England: 英國英格蘭薩默塞特比爾布盧可
zh.lifeSummary: 當Marcus Hussey於1315年出生在英國波克夏素斯 莫雷頓時，他的父親Henry Hughes III24歲，母親Katherine FitzAlan9歲。他於1339年10月18日之前與Margery de Verdun在英國結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1345年2月10日在英國英格蘭薩默塞特享年30歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marcus Hussey于1315年出生在英国波克夏素斯 莫雷頓时，他的父亲Henry Hughes III24岁，母亲Katherine FitzAlan9岁。他于1339年10月18日之前与Margery de Verdun在英国结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于1345年2月10日在英国英格兰薩默塞特享年30岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hussey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: of Norman origin, a nickname for someone who habitually wore a distinctive pair of boots or gaiters, from Old French hosed, hoset, housé, Middle English hosey, hus(s)y,‘booted, gaitered’ (from Latin hosatus).

English: status name or nickname from Middle English hus(e)wyf ‘mistress of a family; wife of a householder’ (a compound of Old English hūs ‘house’ + wīf ‘woman’). Though originally a woman's name, it is often found as a male surname, presumably in a derogatory sense. The vocabulary word became hussie, with the meaning ‘disreputable woman’, in the 16th century; the surname, however, is not associated with this meaning.
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hEodhusa ‘descendant of Eodhus’. This was the name of a bardic family associated with the Maguires of Fermanagh, also Anglicized as Oswell or Oswald .

variants.name: Hosea
meanings: English: variant of   Hussey  . Similarity with the Old Testament prophet's name Hosea (see 3 below) is accidental.
English: in Scotland, where the name is more common, it is sometimes a variant of   Hosie  , itself a form of   Hussey  , or else a variant of   Hossack  .
African (mainly Nigeria and Tanzania): from the Biblical personal name Hosea. In the Old Testament, Hosea was a prophet who married a prostitute in order to illustrate Israel's unfaithfulness to God.

variants.name: Hosie
meanings: Scottish (northeast Scotland): variant of Irish   Hussey  .

variants.name: Oswell
meanings: Irish (Ulster): adopted as an English equivalent of Gaelic Ó hEodhusa ‘descendant of Eodhus’ (see Hussey ).

nameMeanings.name: Marcus
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The original Latin form of Mark , of unknown derivation; it may possibly be connected with Mars, the name of the Roman god of war, or the adjective mas ‘male, virile’ (genitive maris). This was one of the very small number of Roman given names of the classical period. There were only about a dozen of these in general use, with perhaps another dozen confined to particular families. Marcus has been in use in the English-speaking world since the 16th century if not earlier; in the 20th century it enjoyed a considerable increase in popularity. As an African-American name it is sometimes bestowed in honour of the Black Consciousness leader Marcus Garvey ( 1887–1940 ).

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Marcus Hussey was born in 1315, in South Moreton, Berkshire, England, his father, Henry Hughes III, was 24 and his mother, Katherine FitzAlan, was 9. He married Margery de Verdun before 18 October 1339, in England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died on 10 February 1345, in Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 30.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marcus Hussey est né en 1315, à South Moreton, Berkshire, Angleterre, son père, Henry Hughes III, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Katherine FitzAlan, avait 9 ans. Il a épousé Margery de Verdun avant 18 octobre 1339, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé le 10 février 1345, à Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 30 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marcus Hussey 1315 in South Moreton, Berkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry Hughes III 24 und seine Mutter Katherine FitzAlan 9. Er hat vor 18. Oktober 1339 in England Margery de Verdun geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb am 10. Februar 1345 im Alter von 30 Jahren in Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marcus Hussey è nato il nel 1315 nel South Moreton, Berkshire, England, il suo padre, Henry Hughes III, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Katherine FitzAlan, aveva 9 anni. Lui sposato Margery de Verdun prima del 18 ottobre 1339, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì il 10 febbraio 1345, nel Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 30 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Marcus Husseyが1315年にイギリスバークシュアイアソウス モーエトンで生まれた時，父Henry Hughes IIIは24歳，母Katherine FitzAlanは9歳であった。1339年10月18日以前にイギリスでMargery de Verdunと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1345年2月10日にイギリスイギリスソメルセトで30歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Marcus Hussey(이)가 1315년 영국 버크실르 소우스 모레턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry Hughes III(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Katherine FitzAlan(은)는 9세였다. 그는 1339년 10월 18일 이전 영국에서 Margery de Verdun(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1345년 2월 10일 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트에서 30세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marcus Hussey nasceu em 1315, em South Moreton, Berkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry Hughes III, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Katherine FitzAlan, tinha 9 anos. Ele casou-se com Margery de Verdun antes 18 de outubro de 1339, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu em 10 de fevereiro de 1345, em Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 30 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marcus Hussey родился в 1315 г. в местности соут моретон, биркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Henry Hughes III было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Katherine FitzAlan, 9. Он женился на женщине по имени Margery de Verdun перед 18 октябрь 1339 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер 10 февраля 1345 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 30 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marcus Hussey nació en 1315, en South Moreton, Berkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry Hughes III, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Katherine FitzAlan, tenía 9 años. Se casó con Margery de Verdun antes de 18 de octubre de 1339, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió el 10 de febrero de 1345, en Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 30 años.
